name: Christmas Ornament Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixer bowl, beat butter and sugar on medium speed.
2. Add eggs and vanilla; beat until well combined.
3. Sift together flour and baking powder. Mix into the butter mixture until just combined.
4. Divide dough into thirds. Shape each portion into balls, flatten slightly, and wrap in plastic.
5. Refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
6. Roll dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch (or less) and cut out shapes.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 6 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Allow to cool completely before decorating with Christmas Icing.
